description_long: This skateboard features a standard popsicle-shaped deck with a vibrant, detailed graphic on the underside. The deck artwork is a mix of purples, greens, and black, depicting a stylized, possibly fantasy or sci-fi themed illustration with intricate linework and bold contrasts. The top of the deck is covered in solid black grip tape, with no visible patterns or cut-outs, providing a grippy surface for the rider. The skateboard is equipped with four polyurethane wheels in pastel shades of green, purple, and gray, mounted on metallic trucks with a standard kingpin design. The trucks are silver with a matte finish, and the hardware is visible on the top of the deck. The overall build and design suggest it is intended for street or park use, with a focus on both performance and visual appeal.
description: A popsicle-shaped skateboard with a bold, purple and green graphic on the underside, solid black grip tape on top, pastel-colored wheels, and silver trucks. The design is visually striking and built for street or park riding.
description_view_0: The underside of the skateboard is visible, showcasing the detailed purple, green, and black graphic, as well as the pastel wheels and silver trucks.
description_view_1: The top of the skateboard is shown, revealing the solid black grip tape and the hardware mounting points, with the wheels and trucks partially visible.
description_view_2: Another view of the top surface, emphasizing the plain black grip tape and the deck's shape, with a slight view of the colored wheels.
description_view_3: A dynamic angle highlighting both the graphic underside and the colored wheels, with the trucks and deck curvature clearly visible.
attribute_deck_graphic_design: The underside features a vivid, high-contrast illustration in purples, greens, and black, with abstract and possibly fantasy or sci-fi motifs, including sharp lines and organic shapes. No text or branding is visible.
attribute_wheel_type: classic street wheels in pastel green, purple, and gray, with no visible text or logos.
attribute_truck_style: Standard silver trucks with a matte finish, standard kingpin mounting, and no visible branding or unique features.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: Solid black grip tape with no visible patterns, graphics, or text.
